title: Consumer Complaint Database
description: Consumer complaints about financial products and services submitted to the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and forwarded to the responding company. Each row represents a consumer complaint with product, sub-product, issue, company, state, ZIP code, submission method, date received, company response, timely-response flag, and consumer disputed flag.

distribution.title: Consumer Complaint Database - CSV
distribution.description: Full CSV download of the Consumer Complaint Database, refreshed nightly.

distribution.title: Consumer Complaint Database - SODA Endpoint
distribution.description: Socrata Open Data API endpoint with SoQL query support.

distribution.title: Consumer Complaint Database - REST API
distribution.description: Public search REST API powering the CFPB consumer-complaints web UI.
